Hero.description: Hello art enjoyers. This is my path away from screens and doomscrolling—satisfying a yearning for arts and crafts while I capitalise on the decades of hand-to-eye coordination I’ve honed playing maddening platform games.
Hero.footer: All rugs are unique 1-of-1 creations. Studio handcrafted quality.

CTASection.title: Secure Your Vision
CTASection.description: Whether it's a cherished memory, a favorite character, or an original artwork — let's transform it into a statement piece for your collection.

Shop.title: Current Gallery
Shop.description: Available textile art from the current drop. For custom commission requests, please visit the Studio page. Use code sicamon at checkout for 15% curated discount.

pricing.title: Collection Info & Sizing
pricing.details: Pricing is generally £20-40 per square foot depending on detail, with wiggle room for custom budgets. Standard max is 36" x 54". Use code sicamon for curated themes.

items.defaultDescription: Unique hand-tufted rug from my collection.
items.curatorHint: Use code sicamon at checkout to apply 15% curator discount on this piece.

empty.title: The Loom is Currently Silent
empty.description: Every museum-grade piece in the boutique is a unique, hand-tufted creation. The studio is currently preparing the next limited drop.

Contact.title: Studio & Commissions
Contact.intro: Thanks for visiting the studio. Contact me at amonsic@hotmail.com with any commission requests or to get a quote.

discounts.title: Special Collections
discounts.subtitle: Currently offering a 15% discount on pieces themed around the following curated aesthetics:
discounts.content: Apply code sicamon for 15% off themes like: Over the Garden Wall, Gurren Lagann, Kill la Kill, Thundercats, Studio Ghibli, SpongeBob Squarepants, Zelda: Wind Waker, Looney Tunes, & the art of Max Fleischer, Richard Scarry or Mike Mignola.

care.title: Rug Care Guide
care.tip1: Clean the rug regularly – it’s handmade and will molt a little, so vacuum at least once a week. Loose threads are normal and can be trimmed with scissors.
care.tip2: Best for curated decoration rather than high-traffic areas. This is art for your floor, not hard-wearing protection.
care.tip3: If stained, use a soft bristle brush with warm water and detergent, then air dry. Never machine wash as some threads will detach.

Contact.footer: Bespoke Textiles • Handcrafted in the UK
Contact.studioLabel: Hand-tufted bespoke art, handcrafted from my studio.

Footer.description: Handcrafted tufted rugs. 1-of-1 creations made with passion and precision.

Privacy.title: Privacy Protocol
Privacy.subtitle: How personal data and artistic commissions are protected within the secure boutique infrastructure.

collection.title: 1. Data Acquisition
collection.content: The studio only collects essential information required to fulfill bespoke commissions and manage the secure checkout session.

personal.title: 2. Personal Insight
personal.content: Your name, email, and shipping address are held with the strictest confidentiality via a Stripe-integrated CRM.

usage.title: 3. Artistic Usage
usage.content: Commissioned designs are archived for historical studio records unless explicitly requested otherwise by the collector.

security.title: 4. Secure Vaulting
security.content: All transaction data is encrypted and vaulted using industry-standard 256-bit protocols.

rights.title: 5. Collector Rights
rights.content: You maintain full authority over your personal data and can request an archive purge at any moment.

thirdParty.title: 6. Studio Partners
thirdParty.content: Data is never sold. Information is only shared with essential fulfillment partners like Stripe and courier services.

contact.title: 7. Studio Inquiry
contact.content: For privacy-related questions, please message amonsic@hotmail.com directly.

Terms.title: Studio Agreements
Terms.subtitle: The formal governing framework for acquiring pieces from the Sicamon collection.

acceptance.title: 1. Acquisition Terms
acceptance.content: By commissioning or acquiring a piece, you enter into a formal agreement with Sicamon.

service.title: 2. The Craft
service.content: Every piece is a unique 1-of-1 creation. Natural variations and hand-tufted nuances are part of the artistic value.

responsibilities.title: 3. Collector Responsibility
responsibilities.content: Collectors are responsible for providing accurate commission details and shipping information.

intellectual.title: 4. Artistic Property
intellectual.content: Sicamon retains the artistic copyright for all original designs, even after acquisition by a collector.

liability.title: 5. Studio Liability
liability.content: Studio liability is limited to the acquisition price of the piece. I am not responsible for wear resulting from high-traffic environments.

law.title: 6. Governing Jurisdiction
law.content: These terms are governed by the laws of the United Kingdom.

contact.title: 7. Formal Engagement
contact.content: For legal inquiries or term clarifications, contact amonsic@hotmail.com.
